channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: NevaMind-AI /memU | Python | N/A
item.description: Memory for 24/7 proactive agents like openclaw (moltbot, clawdbot).

item.title: superset-sh /superset | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: IDE for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine

item.title: datawhalechina /hello-agents | Python | N/A
item.description: 📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

item.title: X-PLUG /MobileAgent | Python | N/A
item.description: Mobile-Agent: The Powerful GUI Agent Family

item.title: K-Dense-AI /claude-scientific-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo /awesome-llm-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: alibaba /OpenSandbox | Python | N/A
item.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

item.title: bytedance /deer-flow | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

item.title: microsoft /markitdown | Python | N/A
item.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

item.title: ruvnet /ruflo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

item.title: ruvnet /wifi-densepose | Rust | N/A
item.description: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: moeru-ai /airi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
